name: MetaHuman RPG
description: In this world, the metahumans are people which awakened supernatural powers. They appeared 70 years ago after several comets hit the world. Now, they constitute roughly 2% of the world population. Live your life in this world as whatever you want to be; a hero following the country's laws to save lives; a vigilante, following your own code to save normal humans; a rogue, using your powers to fulfill your own goals tethering on the edge of legality; or a villain, using your powers to commit crime
creator: ataraxion
